text: Hydrate watchdog terminal buffers on reconnect
description: Codex watchdog session reconnect showed blank terminals because backend sent only state flags on socket connect. Added initial worker/watchdog terminal history emission via getLines on connect so frontend restores pane content immediately.

reflections.context: Fix reconnect blank-screen behavior in watchdog panel where backend retained PTY history but frontend had no hydration payload.
reflections.outcome: Backend now emits worker-data/watchdog-data snapshots from getLines immediately after socket connection, restoring visible history after reconnect.
reflections.effectiveness: High and low-risk: one targeted connect-time emission path with no protocol changes.
reflections.lesson: Realtime UIs need explicit reconnect hydration, not only live stream events.
reflections.pattern: Same class of bug as session-resume UX: state exists server-side but requires intentional replay on reattach.

status.comment: Implemented in codex-session index.ts; tests pass.
